name: Terreno Realty Corp
summary: Terreno Realty Corporation acquires, owns, and operates industrial real estate in six major coastal U.S. markets: New York City/Northern New Jersey, Los Angeles, Miami, San Francisco Bay Area, Seattle, and Washington, D.C. The company invests in warehouse/distribution, flex (light industrial and R&D), transshipment, and improved land properties. As of December 31, 2025, Terreno owned 309 buildings aggregating approximately 19.8 million square feet and 46 improved land parcels, leased to 683 customers.

products.name: Warehouse/Distribution Facilities
products.description: Single and multiple tenant industrial facilities with dock-high/grade-level doors, truck courts, and 18-36 ft clear heights; ~80.5% of annualized base rent.

products.name: Flex Facilities
products.description: Light industrial and R&D properties serving tenants under 10,000 sq ft with combined office and warehouse/manufacturing use; ~3.4% of annualized base rent.

products.name: Transshipment Facilities
products.description: Truck terminals and transshipment facilities with high dock-high door counts and staging for high-volume truck activity; ~6.0% of annualized base rent.

products.name: Improved Land
products.description: Industrial outdoor storage parcels used for truck, trailer, and car parking, with potential future redevelopment; ~10.1% of annualized base rent.

partnerships.description: Terreno utilizes local third-party property managers for day-to-day property management of its portfolio properties.
